parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_action_decisions (
  id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  action_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  args_hash CHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  decision ENUM('accepted','dismissed') NOT NULL,
  args_json TEXT NULL,
  decided_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_action_args (action_id, args_hash, decided_at),
  INDEX idx_decided (decided_at)
)

)

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_action_decisions (
  id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  action_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  args_hash CHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  decision ENUM('accepted','dismissed') NOT NULL,
  args_json TEXT NULL,
  decided_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_action_args (action_id, args_hash, decided_at),
  INDEX idx_decided (decided_at)
)

SELECT action_id, args_hash, args_json, MAX(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(decided_at)) AS dismissed_at_unix FROM ai_action_decisions WHERE decision = 'dismissed' AND decided_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL {{ Number($('GET /actions/suppressed').first().json.query.days) || 7 }} DAY GROUP BY action_id, args_hash, args_json ORDER BY dismissed_at_unix DESC LIMIT 200
